# Texas Instruments — 800V DC Power Architecture for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## MOST COMPLETE 800V DC LINEUP — NVIDIA Co-Designed — AMERICAN (Dallas, TX)

### 800V-to-6V GaN Converter
- 97.6% efficiency, >2,000 W/in3
- Co-designed with NVIDIA for DSX reference
- Two-stage: 800V->intermediate->6V point-of-load for GPU/CPU

### 800V-to-12V Bus Converter
- For intermediate bus architecture

### 30kW AC/DC PSU Reference Design
- Three-phase flying capacitor PFC + dual LLC
- Configurable +/-400V or 800V output

### 800V Capacitor Backup Unit (CBU)
- EDLC supercapacitors
- 40 W/in3 power density
- Ride-through for power transitions

### 800V Hot-Swap Controller
- Safe hot-insertion of 800V DC loads
- Critical for live rack maintenance

### LMM104RM0 GaN IBC
- Quarter-brick form factor
- 1.6 kW, >97.5% efficiency

### 6V-to-<1V Multiphase Buck
- Final stage to GPU core voltage

## Source: ti.com/about-ti/newsroom/news-releases/2026/2026-03-16
